name: Harvey Mudd College
meets_full_need_notes: Harvey Mudd meets 100% of demonstrated financial need for all admitted domestic students.
no_loan_notes: Harvey Mudd eliminated loans from financial aid packages. All institutional aid is grant-based. Work-study may be included but no loans.
ed_aid_implications: ED applicants receive same need-based aid as RD. Binding commitment but may withdraw if financial aid is insufficient.
appeal_policy: Harvey Mudd reviews appeals for changed financial circumstances through the Office of Financial Aid.
